title: Elderly Centre Monthly Programme Activity
description: Structured activity record extracted from an elderly centre monthly programme document.

activity_id.description: Stable identifier for the extracted activity within the monthly programme.

activity_title.description: Activity name as shown in the source document.

category.description: Activity category, such as talk, class, workshop, outing, service, notice, or other source-supported grouping.

description.description: Brief source-supported description of the activity.

dates.description: One or more dates or date ranges for the activity.

date_text.description: Original date wording from the source.

start_date.description: Normalized start date in YYYY-MM-DD format when clearly known.

end_date.description: Normalized end date in YYYY-MM-DD format when clearly known.

time.description: Activity time as shown in the source document.

fee.description: One or more fee entries, supporting different participant types or fee categories.

fee_type.description: Fee category, such as member, non-member, material fee, deposit, or general.

amount_text.description: Original fee amount wording from the source.

currency.description: Currency code or symbol when clear from the source.

amount.description: Normalized numeric amount when clearly known.

staff_in_charge.description: Staff member, team, or organizer responsible for the activity.

notes.description: Special requirements, reminders, remarks, or other source-supported details.

source_reference.description: Page number, section heading, table row, or nearby text used to trace the record to the source.

uncertain_fields.description: Field names that are missing, unclear, or require human review.

qa_status.description: Current QA state for the extracted record.
